changelog:
✨ Added OpenAI /v1/responses endpoint with streaming, tool calls, and previous_response_id chaining.
✨ Added SQLite-backed observability: persistent request history, paginated audit log, model mix, and heatmap.
✨ Added admin backups with import/export and 30-day response retention.
✨ Added account failover with auto-disable on bad credentials and overage errors.
✨ Added Docker Compose setup that works locally and on Coolify out of the box.
🛠 Modernized admin web UI with i18n (English / Chinese) and email masking.
🐛 Fixed tool schema sanitization, system prompt history, and stream tool call edge cases.
